_comment: Single source of truth for the PR auto-labeler (.github/workflows/pr-autolabel.yml). Drives both label creation (sync-labels) and the set of labels Claude may choose from. The action only ever adds/removes labels listed here ('managed' labels); any other label a human applies is left untouched. Colors are hex without the leading '#'.

labels.type: build: Build system: nix flakes, kernel-builder build, packaging

labels.area: github-actions: GitHub Actions workflows and action versions
labels.area: repo-automation: Repository scripts, bots, freshness checks, and generated automation
labels.area: build-system: build.toml, Nix flakes, packaging, and kernel-builder integration
labels.area: tests: Tests, validation code, and benchmark harnesses
labels.area: docs: README, CARD.md, guides, and repository documentation

labels.new-kernel: A brand-new kernel package is added
labels.new-backend: Adds a backend to an existing kernel
labels.upstream-sync: Syncing a kernel with its upstream source

labels.needs-rebase: Has merge conflicts with the base branch
